messages.source: Chorded shortcuts that start with ${slot1} (${slot2} on macOS). Better for non-English keyboard layouts

messages.source: GitLens won't bind any keyboard shortcuts. Configure your own via the ${slot1} editor

messages.source: ${slot1} based (${slot2} on macOS) shortcuts. Not great for non-English keyboard layouts

messages.source: Search for ${slot1} in the ${slot2} editor to see the shortcuts and to customize them further
